reviews.comment:
Tiene de todo, es muy concurrida y la atención es aceptable. Después de muchas horas de viaje, llegar ahí es lo mejor!

(Translated by Google)
It has everything, it's very busy, and the service is acceptable. After many hours of travel, arriving there is the best part!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSbmNrTm5la05ETlVkSk4xSkllbm94TFhKNU9XYxAB

reviews.comment:
Ayer 3 de enero pase a la estación a cargar 21:45 vi un playero ningún hola o buenas noches dice en 10 minutos empezamos a cargar,  yo le dije uuuu , el me respondió venite más temprano y se fue, yo me quedé tranquilo,  estuve esperando tranquilo,  pero quiero descartar a Gerson, con tanta gente el siempre sonriendo y alegre , a pesar que la gente estaba enojada y apurada el siempre se quedó tranquilo,  con respeto, cuando llego mi oportunidad de cargar me atendió bien, me ofreció todo el servicio,  paso el playero qué me habló mal y le dice queres que me quede , el respondió si vos queres , el respondió no me voy a mi casa vas a tener una larga noche,  le dije como se llama el playero,  me dijo no pasa nada , había una pareja atrás mio me dijo se llama leonel siempre atendió mala manera,

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, January 3rd, I went to the station to fill up at 9:45 PM. I saw an attendant who didn't say hello or good evening. He said, "We'll start filling up in 10 minutes." I said, "Ooh," and he replied, "Come back earlier," and left. I was calm and waited patiently. But I want to rule out Gerson. With so many people around, he was always smiling and cheerful, even though everyone else was angry and in a hurry. He remained calm and respectful. When it was my turn to fill up, he treated me well and offered me all the services. Then the attendant who had spoken rudely to me passed by, and I asked him, "Do you want me to stay?" He replied, "If you want." The attendant responded, "No, I'm going home. You're going to have a long night." I asked him his name, and he said, "It's nothing." There was a couple behind me, and he told me his name was Leonel. He always treated people badly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twelRHY3hWSFJpWWpWSVowNUJTbFJDVWxKdGJtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion de servicio, su único problema es que es muy difícil tener señal para usar la aplicación de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service station, its only problem is that it is very difficult to get a signal to use the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
6 de la mañana, ningún playero atendiendo. Súper lento todo, para esperar un café mucha demora y no había mucha gente. Obviamente no cargos y seguimos a otra estación

(Translated by Google)
6 AM, no attendant working. Everything was incredibly slow; the wait for a coffee was ridiculously long, and there weren't even many people around. Obviously, we skipped the refueling and went to another station.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to rest for a while and fill up with gas. The full station is a bit understocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WcFpVaE5VMmRyUVcxeVJGOUNjRmx3Ym10c0xYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Después de transitar la peor ruta del país, 151, llegamos a esta YPF. No había jabón en los baños, mala atención del personal y además muy caro comprar 2 aguas chiquitas, porque grande tampoco tenían. Muy mala experiencia en esta YPF, en teoría, full.

(Translated by Google)
After driving on the worst highway in the country, Route 151, we arrived at this YPF station. There was no soap in the restrooms, the staff was terrible, and it was very expensive to buy two small bottles of water, because they didn't have any large ones either. A very bad experience at this YPF, which was supposed to be a full-service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kwdFVrUjFTRlpyTldOa1pERmxSMDEyTUdKVmNIYxAB

En este momento fui atendido por Srta SILVANA RAMOS CON GRAN EXCELENCIA Y EFICENCIA RESPECTO A ATENCION HACIA CLIENTES POR PARTE DE YPF ACA 25 DE MAYO iGRACIAS SALVANA! E YPF

(Translated by Google)

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Ariel por su opinión sus comentarios serán trasladados a Silvana

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25RMFlVUjNRVXgzTW1KYWJWSkZTRzVQY0MxNGFVRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar tiene limitaciones entendibles por el punto donde están y el abandono de décadas del sistema de mantenimiento de rutas de la nación, pero a pesar de la falta de, aire para los neumáticos, algunas piezas para los vehiculos y varias cosas que podrían estar al alcance de los viajeros, recibimos una excelente atención de uno de los empleados del shop (perdon por no tomar su nombre) quien nos atendió a cuerpo de rey, con sonrisa, humor y velocidad para trabajar rara vez encontrada en estaciones de servicio. Además, la cafetería servida fué excelente. Hay que mejorar la infraestructura, la variedad de productos y servicions, y la limpieza de los baños

(Translated by Google)
The place has understandable limitations given its location and decades of neglect by the nation's road maintenance system, but despite the lack of air for tires, some vehicle parts, and various other things that could be readily available to travelers, we received excellent service from one of the shop employees (apologies for not getting his name). He treated us like royalty, with a smile, humor, and a speed rarely found at service stations. Furthermore, the coffee served was excellent. The infrastructure, the variety of products and services, and the cleanliness of the restrooms need improvement.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ac05FdDFWM0psUW5KcWNIZDVkamx6U1ZOU1gwRRAB
